# Mortgage Insurance Premium Calculator Calculate how much your premium could cost and learn more about how insurance coverage can benefit you and your family. ## Input your information to start calculating your insurance premium. ## Your Mortgage Details Mortgage balance ![warning](https://dmts.scotiabank.com/tools/creditorinsurancemortgage/common/images/warning.png) Mortgage payment ![warning](https://dmts.scotiabank.com/tools/creditorinsurancemortgage/common/images/warning.png) Payment frequency MonthlyBi-Weekly Your age ![warning](https://dmts.scotiabank.com/tools/creditorinsurancemortgage/common/images/warning.png) ## Insurance coverage you want to add: Life Protection Coverage Percentage Full Insured Balance75%50%Minimum Insured Balance Coverage Amount 400,000 Critical Illness Protection Coverage Percentage Full Insured Balance75%50%Minimum Insured Balance Coverage Amount 400,000 Disability Protection Coverage Percentage Full Insured Payment75%50%Minimum Insured Payment Coverage Amount 2,000 Job Loss Protection Only available with Disability Protection. Coverage Percentage Full Insured Payment75%50%Minimum Insured Payment Coverage Amount 2,000 ## Second borrower’s Mortgage Age of second borrower ![warning](https://dmts.scotiabank.com/tools/creditorinsurancemortgage/common/images/warning.png) ## Insurance coverage for second borrower: Life Protection Coverage Percentage Full Insured Balance75%50%Minimum Insured Balance Coverage Amount 400,000 Critical Illness Protection Coverage Percentage Full Insured Balance75%50%Minimum Insured Balance Coverage Amount 400,000 Disability Protection Coverage Percentage Full Insured Payment75%50%Minimum Insured Payment Coverage Amount 2,000 Job Loss Protection Only available with Disability Protection Coverage Percentage Full Insured Payment75%50%Minimum Insured Payment Coverage Amount 2,000 Add borrower Remove borrower Your insurance coverage will cost an estimated1 $0 /month Plus applicable taxes Total savings: $0 Your rate is lower because your mortgage amount is more than $350,000 Your rate is lower because you chose more than one coverage ![](https://dmts.scotiabank.com/tools/creditorinsurancemortgage/common/images/plus-icon.png) Your rate is lower because your mortgage amount is more than $350,000 Your rate is lower because you chose more than one coverage Your rate is lower because your mortgage amount is more than $350,000 [Apply now\*](https://www.scotiaonline.scotiabank.com/online/authentication/authentication.bns?extid=001&extoption=3306) ## Watch your personalized video See how the benefits of your protection plan can cover you and your family. Watch video 1 This is not an insurance quote. Estimates are approximations based on the data you have entered and are for illustration purposes only. Premiums are calculated as per the Certificate of Insurance and are subject to eligibility requirements. A sample Certificate of Insurance is available on scotiabank.com/insurance. (i) For more details, a sample Certificate of Insurance is available at Scotiabank.com/insurance \\* Through Scotia OnLine. Customers need to have a Mortgage with Scotiabank in order to add protection. Scotia Mortgage Protection is underwritten by The Canada Life Assurance Company under a group policy issued to the Bank of Nova Scotia. All coverage is subject to the terms and conditions outlined in the certificate of insurance which you will receive upon enrolment. Your insurance coverage will cost an estimated1 $0/month plus applicable taxes Total savings: $0 Your rate is lower because your mortgage amount is more than $350,000 Your rate is lower because you chose more than one coverage ![](https://dmts.scotiabank.com/tools/creditorinsurancemortgage/common/images/plus-icon.png) Your rate is lower because your mortgage amount is more than $350,000 Your rate is lower because you chose more than one coverage Your rate is lower because your mortgage amount is more than $350,000 [Apply now](https://www.scotiaonline.scotiabank.com/online/authentication/authentication.bns?extid=001&extoption=3306)\* Close ## Mortgage balance Your outstanding Mortgage Balance. Close ## Mortgage payment Your Monthly or Bi-Weekly Mortgage Payment amount. Close ## Payment frequency How often do you make your mortgage payment, Monthly or Bi-Weekly? Close ## Age Your age is important to accurately determine the premium rate when calculating the coverage. Close ## Age Your co-borrower’s age is important to accurately determine the premium rate when calculating the coverage. Close Your mortgage is over $350,000, so your estimated cost includes a lowered rate on the Life/Critical Illness premium. ## Tiered Mortgage Discounts | Mortgage | Discount | | --- | --- | | $0 - $350,000 | 0% | | $350,000 - $500,000 | 30% | | $500,000 - $1,000,000 | 35% | With Scotia Mortgage Protection Insurance, you can get a tiered discount depending on the total amount of your remaining mortgage up to $1,000,000. For example, if your mortgage is: $950,000 your tiered discount would be as follows: 0% on your first $350,000 30% on your next $150,000 35% on your next $450,000 Close Since you have selected two or more insurance coverages, your estimated cost reflects a lowered rate on the premium. If you and another borrower on the same mortgage account applied for and are approved for insurance coverage, you could save up to 20%. Here’s how: | Number of coverages | Discount | | --- | --- | | Two insurance coverages for you and/or a co-⁠borrower | 10% | | Each additional insurance coverage for you and/or a co-⁠borrower | +5% | | Total maximum discount of 20% | Close ## Life Protection Life Protection insurance can pay off your outstanding mortgage balance in full, up to a maximum of $1,000,000, in the event you pass away. Close ## Critical Illness Protection Critical Illness protection insurance can pay off your entire mortgage account balance, up to a maximum of $500,000, if you are diagnosed with a covered critical illness such as Heart Attack, Stroke, or Cancer. Close ## Disability Protection Disability Protection insurance could cover your mortgage payments up to $3,500 - plus your disability premium - per insured mortgage, per month, for up to 24 months, if you are unable to work because of a medical impairment due to injury, disease, or sickness. Close ## Job Loss Protection Job Loss coverage can cover your mortgage payments, up to $3,500/month per mortgage for a maximum of 6 months, when employment is involuntarily terminated or if you are permanently laid off. Close Here is the insurance coverage you have selected to add: | Your insurance coverage | Coverage percentage | | --- | --- | | N/A | N/A | | Life Protection | Minimum | | Critical Illness Protection | 50% | | Disability Protection | 75% | | Job Loss Protection | Full | | Second borrower's
